stories.title: France pass toughest World Cup test yet in beating...
stories.summary: France haven't really been challenged yet at this World Cup in the way Paraguay tested them Sunday, but Mbappe & Co. were able to stay cool in the sweltering heat and advance to the quarterfinals.

stories.title: France's Mbappé calls Paraguay tactics 'ugly'
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé warned future World Cup opponents that France are ready to "play ugly" and get their "hands dirty" after brushing off Paraguay's provocations in a heated 1-0 round-of-16 victory,

stories.title: Ohtani, Freeman lead Dodgers' 4 All-Star starters
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by three Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to the July 14 All-Star Game.

stories.title: All-Star Alvarez walks off Rays in multi-HR night
stories.summary: Yordan Alvarez added to his AL home run lead with a walk-off against the Rays on Saturday night, his second homer of the night.

stories.title: Sources: Ewing joining Wizards as assistant coach
stories.summary: Georgetown and New York Knicks legend Patrick Ewing agreed to become an assistant coach for the Washington Wizards and head coach Brian Keefe, sources told ESPN on Saturday.
